'''Gorts''' were small creatures with blue feathers. They had a flat beak, three toes, a thin tail, and three eye stalks with one eye on top. They were kept as pets, and their eggs (whose shells were a translucent pinkish-pearl) were considered valuable in many cultures. [[Nicta]] was a gort.

==Appearances==
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Shards of Alderaan]]'' {{1st}} {{C|egg only}}
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Diversity Alliance]]'' {{C|egg only}}
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Delusions of Grandeur]]'' {{C|First hatched appearance}}
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Trouble on Cloud City]]''
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Crisis at Crystal Reef]]''
